SUMMARY:
Korniyenko or Kornienko (Ukrainian: Корнієнко Russian: Корниенко) is a Ukrainian-language surname. It is a patronymic surname derived from the first name Korniy (Корній).
Variants:  Belarusian: Karneyenka (Карнеенка), Russian: Корнеенко [Korneyenko/Korneenko].
